slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Resume Persona A from the saved authoritative replay checkpoint at the end of Week 9 turn summary (`₡1016 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 40% / Sanity 25%`, no active conditions). Start Week 10, complete exactly one additional in-game week using Safe Grinder priorities, log any opening event choices and the Week 10 close, then stop.

last_run.summary: A fresh-context slice resumed Persona A from the authoritative Week 8 summary, found no opening event, completed the full `travel + Work Shift x3 + home` baseline without any labor-screen event or carryover condition, and closed Week 9 at ₡1016 / Debt 0 / Hunger 40% / Sanity 25% on the authoritative replay timeline.
